title: Grassy Golden British Sausage Cornish Pasty
description: A British dish featuring sausage and cheese in a flaky pastry, perfect for a lazy Sunday, this lacto-vegetarian-friendly cornish pasty is filled with grassy and golden ingredients, offering a delightful cheese-pull experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine flour, salt, and cold butter to make the pastry dough.
Gradually add water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a plate or a pastry cutter.
Place a sausage in the center of each dough circle.
Sprinkle shredded cheese and chopped parsley over the sausage.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-circle shape and press the edges together to seal the pasty.
Brush the tops of the pasties with beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Place the pasties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
